AutonomyLevel.description:
Degree of human oversight in AI-assisted decisions.

Example::

    >>> AutonomyLevel.ADVISORY_ONLY
    <AutonomyLevel.ADVISORY_ONLY: 'advisory_only'>
AutonomyLevel.title: AutonomyLevel

CheckResult.description:
Result of a single verification check.

Example::

    >>> CheckResult(check_id="SPAN_EXISTS", passed=True, detail="Span found in input text.")

detail.description: What was checked and the result.
detail.title: Detail

CheckResult.title: CheckResult

Citation.description:
A precise reference to an EU AI Act or ISO 42001 provision.

Example::

    >>> Citation(article_ref="Art. 5(1)(c)", verbatim_text="AI system that evaluates...")

article_ref.description: Article or Annex reference, e.g. 'Art. 5(1)(a)' or 'Annex III, 4(b)'.
article_ref.title: Article Ref

verbatim_text.description: Verbatim text of the provision at the time of assessment.
verbatim_text.title: Verbatim Text

Citation.title: Citation

Classification.description:
Complete classification result from the rule engine + ISO mapper.

Assembled by the pipeline orchestrator. The drafter sees only this,
never the original input text.

Example::

    >>> Classification(final_tier=RiskTier.HIGH, triggered_rules=[...],
    ...                all_rules_evaluated=[...], triggered_citations=[...],
    ...                obligations=[...], iso_controls=[...], requires_human_review=True)

final_tier.description: The highest risk tier triggered by any matched rule.

triggered_rules.description: Rules that matched (matched=True), ordered by tier severity.
triggered_rules.title: Triggered Rules

all_rules_evaluated.description: Every rule evaluated, including non-matches, for full audit trail.
all_rules_evaluated.title: All Rules Evaluated

triggered_citations.description: EU AI Act citations from triggered rules.
triggered_citations.title: Triggered Citations

obligations.description: Compliance obligations arising from this classification, e.g. 'Conformity assessment required (Art. 43)'.
obligations.title: Obligations

iso_controls.description: ISO 42001 Annex A controls applicable to this feature.
iso_controls.title: Iso Controls

requires_human_review.description: Whether this classification requires mandatory human review.
requires_human_review.title: Requires Human Review

human_review_reasons.description: Reasons why human review is required.
human_review_reasons.title: Human Review Reasons

downgrade.description: Present only if Art. 6(3) exception was applied.

feature_name.description: Feature name carried forward for the drafter's context.
feature_name.title: Feature Name

feature_description.description: Feature description carried forward for the drafter's context.
feature_description.title: Feature Description

domain.description: Domain carried forward for the drafter's context.
domain.title: Domain

Classification.title: Classification

ConfidenceLevel.description:
How the extractor arrived at this value.

Example::

    >>> ConfidenceLevel.EXPLICIT
    <ConfidenceLevel.EXPLICIT: 'explicit'>
ConfidenceLevel.title: ConfidenceLevel

DataSensitivity.description:
Categories of data sensitivity relevant to AI Act classification.

Example::

    >>> DataSensitivity.BIOMETRIC
    <DataSensitivity.BIOMETRIC: 'biometric'>
DataSensitivity.title: DataSensitivity

DeploymentScope.description:
Whether the system operates in public or private contexts.

Example::

    >>> DeploymentScope.ONLINE_ONLY
    <DeploymentScope.ONLINE_ONLY: 'online_only'>
DeploymentScope.title: DeploymentScope

DowngradeInfo.description:
Records when Article 6(3) exception downgrades HIGH to LIMITED.

Example::

    >>> DowngradeInfo(original_tier=RiskTier.HIGH, downgraded_tier=RiskTier.LIMITED,
    ...               article_ref="Art. 6(3)", conditions_met=["assistive_autonomy", ...])

requires_human_review.description: Art. 6(3) downgrades always escalate to human review.
requires_human_review.title: Requires Human Review

DowngradeInfo.title: DowngradeInfo

source_span.description: Verbatim substring from the input text that supports this value. Empty string if the value was inferred rather than directly quoted.
source_span.title: Source Span

confidence.description: How the extractor arrived at this value.

source_span.description: Verbatim substring from the input text that supports this value. Empty string if the value was inferred rather than directly quoted.
source_span.title: Source Span

confidence.description: How the extractor arrived at this value.

source_span.description: Verbatim substring from the input text that supports this value. Empty string if the value was inferred rather than directly quoted.
source_span.title: Source Span

confidence.description: How the extractor arrived at this value.

source_span.description: Verbatim substring from the input text that supports this value. Empty string if the value was inferred rather than directly quoted.
source_span.title: Source Span

confidence.description: How the extractor arrived at this value.

source_span.description: Verbatim substring from the input text that supports this value. Empty string if the value was inferred rather than directly quoted.
source_span.title: Source Span

confidence.description: How the extractor arrived at this value.

source_span.description: Verbatim substring from the input text that supports this value. Empty string if the value was inferred rather than directly quoted.
source_span.title: Source Span

confidence.description: How the extractor arrived at this value.

FeatureProfile.description:
Complete structured extraction from a natural-language AI feature description.

This is the ONLY model the extractor LLM populates.
The rule engine and all downstream modules consume it read-only.
The extractor does NOT classify — it extracts.

Example::

    >>> profile = FeatureProfile(
    ...     feature_name=ExtractedField[str](value="CV Screener", source_span="CV Screener", confidence=ConfidenceLevel.EXPLICIT),
    ...     # ... remaining fields ...
    ... )

feature_name.description: Short name of the AI feature being assessed.

description.description: One-paragraph summary of what the AI feature does.

affected_subjects.description: Categories of natural persons affected by the AI system's outputs, e.g. ['job_applicants', 'patients', 'students', 'citizens'].

operators.description: Entities deploying or operating the AI system, e.g. ['employer', 'hospital', 'government_agency'].

autonomy_level.description: Degree of human oversight in the AI-assisted decision.

decision_impact.description: What decision or outcome the AI influences and its potential consequence on affected subjects.

data_types.description: Categories of data the AI system processes.

uses_biometric_data.description: Whether the system processes biometric data (face, voice, gait, etc.).

uses_personal_data.description: Whether the system processes personal data under GDPR.

deployment_scope.description: Whether the system operates in public, private, or mixed spaces.

prohibited_signals.description: Signal tokens from ARTICLE_5_VOCAB that apply to this feature. Empty list if none apply. Valid tokens: biometric_categorization_politics, biometric_categorization_race, biometric_categorization_religion, biometric_categorization_sex_life, biometric_categorization_union, deceptive_technique, emotion_recognition_education, emotion_recognition_workplace, exploit_age_vulnerability, exploit_disability_vulnerability, exploit_socioeconomic_vulnerability, manipulative_technique, predictive_policing_profiling, realtime_remote_biometric_id, social_scoring, subliminal_technique, untargeted_facial_scraping

high_risk_signals.description: Signal tokens from ANNEX_III_VOCAB that apply to this feature. Empty list if none apply. Valid tokens: biometric_categorization, creditworthiness_assessment, critical_infrastructure_safety, democratic_process_influence, education_access_admission, education_cheating_detection, education_level_assessment, education_outcome_evaluation, emergency_dispatch, emotion_recognition, employment_decisions, employment_recruitment, insurance_risk_assessment, justice_research_application, law_enforcement_evidence_reliability, law_enforcement_polygraph, law_enforcement_profiling, law_enforcement_risk_offending, law_enforcement_risk_victim, migration_application_evaluation, migration_person_detection, migration_polygraph, migration_risk_assessment, public_benefits_eligibility, remote_biometric_identification

generates_content.description: Whether the system generates text, images, audio, video, or code.

interacts_with_humans.description: Whether the system interacts directly with natural persons (chatbot, voice assistant, etc.).

generates_deepfakes.description: Whether the system generates or manipulates content that could be mistaken for authentic (deepfakes).

FeatureProfile.title: FeatureProfile

ISOControl.description:
A single ISO/IEC 42001:2023 Annex A control mapped to a classification.

Example::

    >>> ISOControl(control_id="A.5.2", title="AI Risk Assessment",
    ...            description="...", applicability="High-risk system per Art. 9")

applicability.description: Why this control applies to the assessed feature.
applicability.title: Applicability

ISOControl.title: ISOControl

Provenance.description:
Immutable provenance metadata for reproducibility.

Example::

    >>> Provenance(rule_engine_version="0.1.0", schema_version="0.1.0",
    ...            extractor_model_id="nemotron-3-nano:4b", drafter_model_id="gemma4:e4b",
    ...            extractor_prompt_hash="abc123...", drafter_prompt_hash="def456...")

rule_engine_version.description: Semantic version of the rule engine.
rule_engine_version.title: Rule Engine Version

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA at assessment time. Empty if not in a git repo.
git_sha.title: Git Sha

extractor_model_id.description: Ollama model tag used for extraction.
extractor_model_id.title: Extractor Model Id

drafter_model_id.description: Ollama model tag used for drafting.
drafter_model_id.title: Drafter Model Id

extractor_prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the extractor prompt template.
extractor_prompt_hash.title: Extractor Prompt Hash

drafter_prompt_hash.description: SHA-256 of the drafter prompt template.
drafter_prompt_hash.title: Drafter Prompt Hash

Provenance.title: Provenance

RiskTier.description:
EU AI Act risk classification tiers, ordered by severity.

Example::

    >>> RiskTier.HIGH
    <RiskTier.HIGH: 'high'>
RiskTier.title: RiskTier

RuleEval.description:
Result of evaluating one deterministic rule against a FeatureProfile.

Produced only by the rule engine, never by an LLM. Every rule emits one
of these whether it matched or not, so the audit trail records the entire
decision path.

Example::

    >>> RuleEval(rule_id="ART5_C_SOCIAL_SCORING", matched=True, tier=RiskTier.PROHIBITED,
    ...          article_ref="Art. 5(1)(c)", verbatim_provision="...", triggered_signals=["social_scoring"])

matched.description: Whether this rule's conditions were satisfied.
matched.title: Matched

tier.description: The risk tier this rule asserts when matched.

article_ref.description: EU AI Act article or annex reference.
article_ref.title: Article Ref

verbatim_provision.description: Verbatim provision text at assessment time.
verbatim_provision.title: Verbatim Provision

triggered_signals.description: Signal tokens from the feature profile that caused this match.
triggered_signals.title: Triggered Signals

rationale.description: Brief explanation of why this rule matched or did not.
rationale.title: Rationale

RuleEval.title: RuleEval

VerificationResult.description:
Aggregated verification result for an extraction or drafted memo.

Example::

    >>> result = VerificationResult(checks=[...], passed=True, escalate=False)

passed.description: True only if all error-severity checks passed.
passed.title: Passed

escalate.description: True if issues require human intervention.
escalate.title: Escalate

VerificationResult.title: VerificationResult

description: Immutable, hash-chained audit record for a single AI Act risk assessment. Validated before writing. Canonical JSON serialization used for hashing.

timestamp_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the assessment completed.
timestamp_utc.title: Timestamp Utc

input_text_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the original input text.
input_text_sha256.title: Input Text Sha256

input_text_length.description: Character length of the original input text.
input_text_length.title: Input Text Length

memo_verification.description: Verification of the drafted memo (citation checks).

previous_record_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the previous AuditRecord's canonical JSON. None for the first record in the chain.
previous_record_sha256.title: Previous Record Sha256

title: AI Act Risk Assessor — Audit Record
